steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the phrase “genetic research only recently,” which signals that the blank must describe what the research did to identify the ancestor.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the clue
steps.content:
Revealed means the research showed or made known that the ancestor is teosinte grass, matching the clue that genetic research only recently did this.
The other three verbs either don’t make sense with “its ancestor to be teosinte grass” or conflict with the idea of a recent finding.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
